code: # WC 2026 — Tournament-level prop questions (DATA-05). Bilingual prompts.
# answer_type must match schema CHECK: single_team | single_player | text
# points = positive integer reward awarded when prop is settled correctly by admin (Phase 2).

prompt_en: Who will win the World Cup?
Who will be the tournament top scorer?
Who will win the Golden Boot (Top Scorer trophy)?
Who will win the Golden Ball (Best Player)?
prompt_he: מי יזכה בכדור הזהב (השחקן הטוב ביותר)?

prompt_en: Which team will provide the biggest upset?
prompt_he: איזו נבחרת תספק את ההפתעה הגדולה ביותר?

prompt_en: Which non-favourite will reach the semi-finals?
prompt_he: איזו נבחרת לא-מועדפת תגיע לחצי הגמר?
